menu.title: Bot Management
menu.empty: No managed bots found. Create the first bot profile.

prompt.telegram_username: Send the Telegram bot username without @.
prompt.token: Send the Telegram bot token. It will be fingerprinted and redacted.

create.cancelled: Bot creation cancelled. No bot profile was created.

lifecycle.archive_confirmation: Archive this bot profile? A reason will be required before the change is recorded.
lifecycle.reason_prompt: Send the operational reason for this lifecycle change.
lifecycle.reason_cancelled: Lifecycle change cancelled. No bot state was changed.

error.unauthorized: You are not authorized for this action
error.invalid_transition: This lifecycle transition is not allowed
error.missing_reason: A reason is required for this transition
error.no_user: Could not identify the Telegram user
error.duplicate_username: A managed bot with this Telegram username already exists
error.create_failed: Could not create the managed bot profile
